mapper.select: SELECT * FROM book WHERE book_title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{bookTitle}, '%')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO book ( book_title, author_name, publisher, publish_date, book_price, book_stock, stock_status, book_summary, cover_image, category_id, isbn, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{book_title}, #{author_name}, #{publisher}, #{publish_date}, #{book_price}, #{book_stock}, #{stock_status}, #{book_summary}, #{cover_image}, #{category_id}, #{isbn}, NOW(), NOW() )
